Finally the Ritual faucet is live  Been waiting for this for a while… and now it’s time to build & play

https://t.co/t8ONbT7mfV

profile_bio.description: fortunetly life must go on - Bernadya 🎵 | @ritualfnd MAXI

quoted_tweet.text:
gRitual 

I just launched an on-chain 2048 game on Ritual testnet 
real gameplay, real moves, real transactions
it’s already playable

link : https://t.co/t8ONbT7mfV

how it works:
1. connect wallet (MetaMask)
2. switch to Ritual Testnet
3. start the game
4. move tiles (up / down / left / right)
5. all moves are stored locally
6. play until you’re done
7. click “Submit Game”
8. confirm 1 transaction
9. your moves go on-chain
10. check leaderboard

no spam transactions
just 1 clean submission

simple game, real on chain data
who’s getting the highest score? 👀

btw this is just v1
more features & rewards coming soon

@ritualnet @ritualfnd 
@joshsimenhoff @Jez_Cryptoz @0xMadScientist @dunken9718 @cryptooflashh

kept.text:
Replit, turned 10 🎂

To celebrate we’re making it totally free for 24 hours starting at 5am PT.

But our work—to make coding accessible for all—goes back to 2011.

Watch the highlights from the journey:

It’s been an honor to help millions learn & ship. Here is to the next 10! https://t.co/5vWdSOw9P0

Update on Simcluster ( @simcluster ):  

My Position:    
    Top 11 (General leaderboard)
    Agentic Leaderboard:   -- (Not LIVE) 
    ~12 posts/ day + Leaderboard + Interactions 

  - Spent $10 on vClout (2500 clout limit)
  - Spent $50 on Agent in total as of today, prompting and other social tool development on Simcluster using @Replit 
     e.g:   https://t.co/KtDM52BXtg 
    - Created a tool for Agent - Agent interaction.
    - Testing other interactions 
    - Only 47 Users have connected their Agents via my link. (as per participation rules)

20 More days to go,

kept.text:
REPLIT JUST LAUNCHED AI SLIDES THAT DON'T LOOK LIKE AI MADE THEM

every other AI slide generator spits out decks that scream "made by AI."

replit slides is going hard on the angle that yours will actually look presentable.

how it works:

> describe what you want and it builds a full deck
> start from scratch or use a built-in template
> import an existing pptx and let AI restyle the whole thing
> export to pptx, pdf, or google slides

the actually interesting part:

> slides are generated as code under the hood
> same project can also spin up apps, mobile UIs, dashboards, and animations
> everything shares the same design tokens (fonts, colors, spacing)
> so your launch deck and the live dashboard it links to look like one product

this isn't really replit competing with gamma or tome. its replit betting that slides, dashboards, animations, and apps are all just code (and once you have an agent that writes code well, every knowledge artifact comes from the same prompt).

link in replies 👇

profile_bio.description: Free tools, news, and resources for creators. Sign up to our newsletter → https://t.co/yYbNds4tCq

kept.text:
Hot take.

AI is genuinely good now, and pretending otherwise is starting to look silly.

It has your context, your voice, your past work, your weird little phrasings.

It can draft faster than you can think of a coherent sentence.

Not better than you. Just faster.

And here's the part people keep conveniently missing.

You can edit it. You can rewrite it. You can throw 90% of the output straight in the trash.

The blank page was always the real enemy, not the quality of the first draft.

AI kills the blank page in about four seconds.

Just generate ten variations, pick the one with a pulse, and make it yours.

That's not "AI slop."That's called having a starting point.

Refusing to use AI to ideate in 2026 is a bad idea.

Have fun with that. The rest of us are shipping.
